chunks.page_summary: This page is a technical drawing detailing the dimensions, flange specifications, and EHEDG compliance criteria for the Rheonics SRV EHEDG long inline viscometer, including surface finish requirements and intellectual property notes.

key_facts: Flange types must be specified in the order.
Available flange sizes for DIN standards (DIN11853-1/2/3, DIN11864-1/2/3, DIN 11851) and ISO 2852 (DIN 32676 B) have a nominal diameter of >=DN50.
Other flange types such as Variline® and BoiControl® are also supported.
The product is designed for EHEDG compliance, requiring that the criterion D-30mm>L be fulfilled.
All wetted surfaces of the product have a roughness less than Ra 0.8.
The document itself is a proprietary drawing of Rheonics and is protected by copyright (2 paragraph 1 fig.7 copyright act of 9th Sept. 1965).
The SRV EHEDG long product is covered by US and International patents, both granted and pending.
Rheonics provides inline process density and viscosity monitoring solutions.
warnings_notes: For EHEDG compliance the criterion: D-30mm>L must be fulfilled
